name: Playtest 9: Moonbeam Arena
description:
TESTS: Click-to-place AoE targeting (Moonbeam placed at a hex, not on caster), AoE preview overlay (gold hexes showing blast radius while hovering), movable zones (Moonbeam moved as action, Flaming Sphere moved as bonus action), fixed-center zone persistence (zone stays when caster moves), zone entry damage (enemies walking into zone), zone start-of-turn damage, concentration break removes zone, Fireball instant AoE at hex.

A druid faces hobgoblins in a forest clearing. The open terrain encourages zone placement and repositioning. TEST STEPS: (1) Cast Moonbeam on a hex near enemies — verify gold preview appears, zone placed at clicked hex, not on caster. (2) Move Willow away — verify zone stays at original hex. (3) Next turn, use Move Zone action to reposition Moonbeam over an enemy. (4) Break concentration — verify zone vanishes. (5) Cast Flaming Sphere, move it as bonus action on same turn. (6) Have Elara cast Fireball at a hex — verify instant AoE damage, no zone created.
